---
title: "Academy"
subtitle: "Learn, collaborate, and grow with our educational programs"
description: "Browse chen.ist Academy's courses, webinars, events, and training programs in cybersecurity, open source, cloud, and software development."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .ap { --c: #F5A623; --g: #86868b; font-family: 'Open Sans', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; }
        .ap-hero { padding: 12rem 0 8rem; text-align: center; }
        .ap-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.045em; line-height: 1.06; }
        .ap-hero .gr { color: var(--c); }
        .ap-hero p { font-size: 1.35rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 520px; margin: 1.5rem auto 0; line-height: 1.45; }
        .ap-s { padding: 7rem 0; }
        .ap-bg { padding: 7rem 0; background: #f5f5f7; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ap-bg { background: #161617; }
        .ap h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.035em; text-align: center; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .ap .sub { text-align: center; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto 5rem; }
        .ap-t { text-align: center; padding: 0 0.75rem; }
        .ap-t i { font-size: 1.75rem; color: var(--c); display: block; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.85; }
        .ap-t h3 { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; }
        .ap-t p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.5; }
        .ap-lk { color: var(--c); font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-lk:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .ap-lk::after { content: " ›"; font-weight: 300; }
        .ap-r { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6rem; }
        .ap-r.rv { flex-direction: row-reverse; }
        .ap-ri { flex: 0 0 50%; }
        .ap-ri img { width: 100%; border-radius: 28px; }
        .ap-rt h2 { text-align: left; font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 3.5vw, 2.75rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ap-rt p { font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.65; }
        .ap-rt .lk { margin-top: 1.75rem; }
        .ap-n { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 6rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        .ap-nn { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 700; color: var(--c); line-height: 1; text-align: center; }
        .ap-nl { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--g); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-top: 0.35rem; text-align: center; }
        .ap-cta { padding: 10rem 0; text-align: center; }
        .ap-cta h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ap-cta p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 420px; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem; line-height: 1.5; }
        .ap-b { display: inline-block; padding: 0.85rem 2.25rem; background: var(--c); color: #fff; border-radius: 980px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s; }
        .ap-b:hover { background: #d9901e; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-bo { display: inline-block; padding: 0.85rem 2.25rem; border: 1.5px solid var(--c); color: var(--c); border-radius: 980px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.15s; }
        .ap-bo:hover { background: var(--c); color: #fff; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-d { width: 36px; height: 3px; background: var(--c); margin: 0 auto 3.5rem; border-radius: 2px; opacity: 0.6; }
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
          .ap-hero { padding: 7rem 0 5rem; }
          .ap-r, .ap-r.rv { flex-direction: column; gap: 3rem; }
          .ap-ri { flex: none; }
          .ap-rt h2 { text-align: center; }
          .ap-n { gap: 3rem; }
          .ap-cta { padding: 6rem 0; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="ap">

<div class="ap-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>chen.ist <span class="gr">Academy</span></h1>
    <p>Hands-on courses, trainings, and programs in cybersecurity, open-source, and digital skills.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Learn by doing</h2>
    <p class="sub">Six ways to build real-world technical skills.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="ap-t"><i class="bi bi-book"></i><h3>Courses</h3><p>Multi-week programs in cybersecurity, privacy, and open-source development.</p><a href="/academy/courses.html" class="ap-lk">Browse courses</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="ap-t"><i class="bi bi-lightning"></i><h3>Trainings</h3><p>Intensive 1-2 day workshops on focused topics with hands-on labs.</p><a href="/academy/trainings.html" class="ap-lk">Browse trainings</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="ap-t"><i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i><h3>Microlearning</h3><p>1-2 hour sessions on specific tools — CLI, NixOS, Emacs, tmux, and more.</p><a href="/academy/microlearning.html" class="ap-lk">Browse sessions</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="ap-t"><i class="bi bi-trophy"></i><h3>Hackathons</h3><p>Cybersecurity, AI ethics, and SpaceApps challenges. Build under pressure.</p><a href="/academy/events.html" class="ap-lk">See events</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="ap-t"><i class="bi bi-camera-video"></i><h3>Webinars</h3><p>Live online sessions on zero trust, cloud security, and digital transformation.</p><a href="/academy/webinars.html" class="ap-lk">View schedule</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="ap-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>Computer Club</h3><p>Weekly meetups for coding, hacking, and building together.</p><a href="/academy/programs/computerclub/" class="ap-lk">Join the club</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-r">
      <div class="ap-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.jpg" alt="Academy training session"></div>
      <div class="ap-rt">
        <h2>Real skills.<br>Not certificates.</h2>
        <p>Every course is built around practical exercises, real tools, and scenarios from actual engagements. You leave with skills you can use on Monday morning — not a PDF you'll never open.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/academy/courses.html" class="ap-lk">Explore the curriculum</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-r rv">
      <div class="ap-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.jpg" alt="Hackathon coding"></div>
      <div class="ap-rt">
        <h2>Build under pressure.<br>Learn faster.</h2>
        <p>Our hackathons and summer school programs immerse you in 24-48 hour challenges. SpaceApps, cybersecurity, AI ethics — real problems, real teams, real deadlines.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/academy/events.html" class="ap-lk">See upcoming programs</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-n">
      <div><div class="ap-nn">6</div><div class="ap-nl">Full courses</div></div>
      <div><div class="ap-nn">7</div><div class="ap-nl">Intensive trainings</div></div>
      <div><div class="ap-nn">14</div><div class="ap-nl">Microlearning sessions</div></div>
      <div><div class="ap-nn">4</div><div class="ap-nl">Languages</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-d"></div>
    <h2>Start learning</h2>
    <p>Browse our catalog or book a call to discuss custom training for your team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/academy/courses.html" class="ap-b">Browse courses</a>
      <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ap-bo">Book a consultation</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
